features: 🌿 Enriched with Aloe Vera: Nourishes and hydrates hair while providing reliable styling support.
💪 Strong & Flexible Hold: Keeps hairstyles in place without stiffness or crunchiness.
❌ Alcohol-Free & Non-Flaky: Gentle on scalp and hair—no dryness, residue, or flaking.
✨ Smooth, Natural Finish: Adds light shine and definition without making hair greasy or sticky.
🧴 150ml Convenient Size: Ideal for daily styling at home, gym, or travel.

product_details_tab_data.Ingredients: Aqua, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Alcohol Denat., Sorbitol, Glycerin, Sodium Polyitaconate, Xanthan Gum, Propanediol, Panthenol, Hydrolyzed Keratin, Polyglyceryl-6 Ricinoleate, Phenoxyethanol, Glycereth-7 Caprylate/ Caprate, Sodium Lauroyl Sarcosinate, Sorbitan Sesquicaprylate, Sodium Chloride, Coco-Caprylate/Caprate, Palmitamidopropyltrimonium Chloride, Diisopropyl Adipate, Parfum, Disodium EDTA, Hydroxyacetophenone, Polyglyceryl-6 Caprylate, Polyglyceryl-3 Cocoate, Polyglyceryl-4 Caprate, Ethylhexylglycerin, Sodium Hyroxide.
product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. In case of contact, rinse thoroughly with water. Do not apply to broken, irritated, or damaged skin. Discontinue use if rash or irritation occurs. Keep out of reach of children. Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. If swallowed, seek medical advice immediately.
